headline: Intel Stock Slips Below Its Record High. Why People Are Worried.
summary: Shares of chip maker Intel were stalling again Monday after their big run-up over the past month.  Investors are torn between excitement over strong earnings reports from artificial intelligence hyperscalers last week and fears of an AI bubble popping sooner rather than later.  The U.S. announced an effective 10% stake in Intel last August, making it the largest single investor in the U.S.-based chip maker.
